items.label: SpaceX
items.headline: SpaceX Soars 27% in Nasdaq Debut as Shares Hit $172.17
items.summary: SpaceX shares surged 27% on their Nasdaq debut, closing at $172.17. The IPO valued the company over $2 trillion, marking a milestone for Elon Musk's aerospace venture.

items.label: SpaceX
items.headline: Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX shares jump
items.summary: Shares in Elon Musk's SpaceX jumped 11 percent to $150 on their first day of trading Friday after the biggest initial public offering in history, making the polarizing entrepreneur the world's first trillionaire as he vowed to take humanity to Mars.

Tesla's autonomous driving progress could revolutionize transportation, shifting revenue models from car sales to recurring robotaxi services.

items.headline: Elon Musk becomes world’s first trillionaire as SpaceX shares jump
items.summary: SpaceX shares jumped as much as 30% as Musk promised to take people to Mars.
